title: Powered Gear
description: A small addon to SilentGear, that allows the use of Forge Energy (FE) to repair SilentGear items.
body:
This is a small addon for SilentGear, that allows the use of Forge Energy (FE) to repair items, thus essentially replacing durability.
This mod adds the Powered Upgrade, which can be crafted from an advanced upgrade base and some redstone. Combining any SilentGear tool or armor with this upgrade adds the Powered trait to the item. This adds an energy storage proportional to the durability of the item to it.
As long as the energy storage contains any energy, the item will not take durability damage, instead using up some of the energy for every durability point it negates.
When the tool runs out of energy it will lose durability again, but this will be repaired as soon as the tool receives sufficient energy again.

This mod requires Silent Gear and Silent Lib to be installed!

This mod does not add any way of generating energy or charging an item with energy. Use other mods for this!






This mod is only uploaded to GitHub and Modrinth by the author!
Those are the only two places this mod is officialy available!
Be aware that any downloads from other pages may not be the original!
